title: antholyza hantamensis
intro: Antholyza hantamensis, also known as Hantam or Witfontein tea, is a medicinal plant species native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The plant's health benefits include the treatment of various ailments such as diarrhea, dyspepsia, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Antholyza hantamensis is often made into a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in capsule or tincture form.
